footer.description: A collaborative storytelling platform designed for families, friends, and creators to perform live, interactive shows without physical constraints.
hero.body: Step into the digital spotlight. Perform live interactive stories with your community from anywhere in the world.
auth.confirmation.sentTo: Check your inbox — we sent a sign-in link to
modal.deleteStoryMessage: Are you sure you want to delete the story "{{title}}"? This action cannot be undone.
modal.removeActorMessage: {{name}} will be removed from this story.
session.title: Live Session
session.description: Join the remote session to collaborate with others in real-time. Your microphone will be used for live voice interactions. You can mute your microphone at any time.
session.decline: I don't want to join session.
scene.noActorToCast: No Actor to cast, can't assign yet.
scene.noBackgroundInLibrary: No background in library to assign yet.
scene.noSoundInLibrary: No sound in library assigned yet
actors.inviteDescription: Invite actors by email. They can log in once invited.
tooltip.characterAssigned: Your character is assigned by the director and cannot be changed.
meta.home.title: potmagic: Live Story Theater
meta.home.description: Step into the digital spotlight. potmagic is a live collaborative storytelling platform for families, friends, and creators to perform interactive stories from anywhere.
meta.home.ogDescription: Perform live interactive stories with your community from anywhere in the world. Directors, actors, and audiences connect in real-time.
meta.home.twitterDescription: Perform live interactive stories with your community from anywhere in the world.
meta.concept.title: Concept — potmagic: Live Story Theater
meta.concept.description: Learn about the vision behind potmagic — a live story theater platform built for Directors, Actors, and Communities to create and share interactive stories in real-time.
meta.concept.ogDescription: A deliberate antidote to passive screen consumption. potmagic brings people together through live, collaborative storytelling.
meta.pricing.title: Pricing — potmagic
meta.pricing.description: Simple, honest plans for every stage. From free family shows to full professional productions — potmagic has a plan for every storyteller.
meta.pricing.ogDescription: Simple, honest plans for every stage. From free family shows to full professional productions.
meta.auth.title: Sign In — potmagic: Live Story Theater
meta.auth.description: Sign in or join potmagic to start directing, acting, or watching live interactive stories.

meta.docs.title: Docs — potmagic
meta.docs.description: Learn how to use potmagic — guides for Directors, Actors, and Viewers on creating stories, managing scenes, and performing live.
meta.docs.ogDescription: Guides for Directors, Actors, and Viewers on creating stories, managing scenes, and going live.
meta.docs.createStory.title: Create a Story — potmagic: Live Story Theater
meta.docs.createStory.description: Learn how to create a new story as a Director on potmagic — add scenes, assign cast, and go live.
meta.docs.addScenes.title: Add Scenes — potmagic: Live Story Theater
meta.docs.addScenes.description: Learn how to add and sequence scenes within a story on potmagic.
meta.docs.props.title: Props Library — potmagic: Live Story Theater
meta.docs.props.description: Manage your props library on potmagic — upload characters, backgrounds, and animated assets.

meta.docs.sizeGuidelines.description: Recommended sizes and dimensions for character, background, and prop assets on potmagic.

notFound.body: The curtain has fallen on this URL. Let's get you back to the stage.
